nodes.label: ALT header line
nodes.comment: Represents ##ALT=<ID=...,Description=...> used for symbolic alternate alleles.

nodes.label: contig header line
nodes.comment: Represents ##contig=<ID=...,length=...,assembly=...,...> entries.

nodes.label: field definition
nodes.comment: Common superclass for INFO/FORMAT/FILTER/ALT header definitions.

nodes.label: FILTER header line
nodes.comment: Represents ##FILTER=<ID=...,Description=...>.

nodes.label: FORMAT field value
nodes.comment: A structured key/value for one FORMAT attribute within a sample call.

nodes.label: FORMAT header line
nodes.comment: Represents ##FORMAT=<ID=...,Number=...,Type=...,Description=...>.

nodes.label: VCF header line
nodes.comment: A structured representation of one VCF header line (e.g., ##fileformat, ##INFO=<...>).

nodes.label: INFO field value
nodes.comment: A structured key/value for one INFO attribute within a record/call.

nodes.label: INFO header line
nodes.comment: Represents ##INFO=<ID=...,Number=...,Type=...,Description=...>.

nodes.label: sample call
nodes.comment: Per-sample values for a variant call (e.g., GT, DP, AD), as declared by FORMAT header lines.

nodes.label: variant call
nodes.comment: Call-level representation for a record: QUAL/FILTER/INFO, plus FORMAT and per-sample fields.

nodes.label: VCF file
nodes.comment: A VCF file artifact (as a dataset distribution) that contains a header and a set of VCF records.

nodes.label: VCF header
nodes.comment: Container for the structured header lines of a VCF file.

nodes.label: VCF Number arity
nodes.comment: Represents INFO/FORMAT Number values (e.g., 0, 1, A, R, G, .).

nodes.label: VCF record
nodes.comment: A row in a VCF (CHROM, POS, ID, REF, ALT, QUAL, FILTER, INFO, FORMAT, samples...). This is a VCF-centric view; link to a sequence alteration representation via vcfr:asSequenceAlteration.

nodes.label: VCF value type
nodes.comment: Enumerates VCF Type values used in INFO/FORMAT definitions: Integer, Float, Flag, Character, String.

nodes.label: as sequence alteration
nodes.comment: Links a VCF record/call to a sequence alteration representation (e.g., SB/gvar SequenceAlteration: so:0001059).

nodes.label: chromosome / contig reference
nodes.comment: Reference sequence for CHROM, preferably resolvable (e.g., INSDC/RefSeq/Ensembl). Can align to FALDO reference.

nodes.label: declared by
nodes.comment: Links an INFO/FORMAT/FILTER/ALT value/usage to its header definition line.

nodes.label: ALT
nodes.comment: ALT allele string; for multiple ALT alleles you may repeat this property or use rdf:List externally.

nodes.label: field Number
nodes.comment: The VCF Number value as string (e.g., 0, 1, A, R, G, .).

nodes.label: field value
nodes.comment: Literal string value; for typed values prefer vcfr:fieldValueInteger/Decimal/Boolean when possible.

nodes.label: FILTER
nodes.comment: FILTER column value (e.g., PASS, ., or semicolon-separated list). Prefer splitting into multiple vcfr:filter values.

nodes.label: FORMAT raw
nodes.comment: Raw FORMAT string as in VCF (optional). Use structured vcfr:FormatFieldValue in SampleCall.

nodes.label: INFO raw
nodes.comment: Raw INFO string as in VCF (optional). Use structured vcfr:InfoFieldValue for machine-use.

nodes.label: ID
nodes.comment: VCF ID column (e.g., rsID). Use when present; otherwise omit.

nodes.label: Distribution
nodes.comment: Referenced external term

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.comment: Referenced external term

nodes.label: Resource
nodes.comment: Referenced external term

nodes.label: SO_0001059
nodes.comment: Referenced external term

nodes.label: boolean
nodes.comment: Referenced external term

nodes.label: date
nodes.comment: Referenced external term

nodes.label: decimal
nodes.comment: Referenced external term

nodes.label: integer
nodes.comment: Referenced external term

nodes.label: string
nodes.comment: Referenced external term
